name: Calcolatore Aumento Stipendio
desc: Calcola New salary = Current salary × (1 + Raise%/100). Esempio: Salary €28,000, raise 4.5% = New salary = €29,260. Calcolatore gratuito e preciso, senza registrazione.
description: Calcola New salary = Current salary × (1 + Raise%/100). Esempio: Salary €28,000, raise 4.5% = New salary = €29,260. Calcolatore gratuito e preciso, senza registrazione.
seo_description: Calcola New salary = Current salary × (1 + Raise%/100). Esempio: Salary €28,000, raise 4.5% = New salary = €29,260. Calcolatore gratuito e preciso, senza regist
example_label: Calcolating new salary after a 7.5% raise on current €2,450 monthly salary.
result_context: Your nuevo_salario of {nuevo_salario} reflects the raise. The incremento of {incremento} shows the monthly increase amount.
mistakes: Not considering tax implications of higher salary bracket
Forgetting to negotiate benefits alongside salary increase
Comparing percentage raises without considering inflation
